name: spotify-mcp-server

scripts.build: esbuild src/index.ts src/auth.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node18 --outdir=build --banner:js='#!/usr/bin/env node' && node -e "require('fs').chmodSync('build/index.js', '755'); require('fs').chmodSync('build/auth.js', '755')"

author: Marcel Marais
description: A Model Context Protocol server for Spotify integration
